Motion For Mandatory Change Of Venue Pursuant To Ccp 397(A), 398 And Request For Stay Or/Dismiss Based On Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar May-12-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ross M. Petty, Esq. of THELEN, REID 369-7348, for defendant Ford Motor Co. and DaimlerChrysler Corp. moving for Mandatory Change Of Venue Pursuant To Ccp 397(A), 398 And Request For Stay Or/Dismiss Based On Forum Non Conveniens
William Andrew Levin, Esq., 646-7160, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified -- DEFENDANTS FORD MOTOR COMPANY and DaimlerChrysler Corp.'s Motion For Mandatory Change Of Venue Pursuant To Ccp 397(A), 398 And Request For Stay Or/Dismiss Based On Forum Non Conveniens -- Granted; action transferred to Ventura County. The transfer should be expedited and plaintiff is to pay the transfer fees. Motion to dismiss is denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/DR) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
